From the manufacturer

Product Description

A modern take on the classic clog, the new Burree makes a case for wearing slippers beyond the house. Cuing up a soft suede upper, plush faux fur interior, and durable EVA sole, this seasonless slip-on delivers cozy vibes all year long.
